prestazioni: Full bolt-on turbo system for the K24Z7 (2.4L DOHC i-VTEC) utilizing a Garrett GTX3071R Gen II turbocharger with a 0.63 A/R turbine housing, paired with a PRL Motorsports short-ram intake and a custom 3-inch turbo-back exhaust featuring a Tomei 80mm titanium exhaust tip and a Vibrant 1799 high-flow catalytic converter

K-Tuned K24Z7 stroker kit (2.6L displacement) with forged Eagle crankshaft (87.5mm stroke), Manley H-beam connecting rods, and JE 12.5:1 compression pistons, mated to a K-Tuned billet oil pump and ACL Race Series bearings, with a Hondata KPro V4 ECU reflash for optimized fuel and ignition mapping

Full suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (FL5-specific valving), Whiteline adjustable rear sway bar (24mm), and Hardrace front upper control arms with spherical bearings, complemented by a Cusco Type RS 2-point front strut bar and a Spoon Sports rear lower tie bar
estetica: Liberty Walk LB Works FL5-specific widebody kit with carbon fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and a custom 3-piece rear diffuser, finished in a 3-stage House of Kolor Kandy Apple Red paint with a matte black roof and mirror caps

Seibon Carbon FL5 Type R-specific carbon fiber hood with a 30mm aggressive front lip splitter from Verus Engineering, paired with a custom rear wing from APR Performance (GTC-300 model) mounted on carbon fiber risers for adjustable angle

Interior overhaul featuring Bride Zeta III FL5-specific bucket seats with Takata 4-point harnesses, a MOMO Mod.78 carbon fiber steering wheel with a quick-release hub, and a custom roll cage from AutoPower Industries (8-point bolt-in with gusseted rear legs and a harness bar)
